Fire data is hot

David Migoya Detroit Free Press September 1996
Public SafetyJournalism & NewsroomHealth & Environment

The Detroit phenomenon known as Devil's Night was only weeks away, and familiar newsroom rumblings of City Hall's dubious fire count accuracy began anew...

The Detroit phenomenon known as Devil's Night was only weeks away, and familiar newsroom rumblings of City Hall's dubious fire count accuracy began anew... After asking the Detroit fire department's computer analyst how the numbers actually are counted, I analyzed the Devil's Night fires for a five-year period. What I found was interesting. The numbers were indeed misstated, at least in non-fire department terms.
